title: eriosema longiflorum
intro: Eriosema longiflorum, also known as the "Buttercup Bush" or "Yellow Pea Bush," is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Eriosema longiflorum include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Eriosema longiflorum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
